description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Fuzzer that runs on push, pull request, and a scheduled cron job. The workflow clones the Godot repository and a module, then checks out a fuzzer backend. It configures the fuzzer, installs dependencies, and uses a cache for SCons. The workflow then sets up Python, installs SCons, compiles the project with specific flags, runs the fuzzer, and uploads the results as artifacts.
